query_intent: Compare item return quantities across store, catalog, and web channels for weeks containing three reference dates in 2001, and report each channel's deviation from the cross-channel average.

dag_nodes.intent: Aggregate store return quantity by item for weeks containing 2001-06-06, 2001-09-02, and 2001-11-11.
Aggregate catalog return quantity by item for the same selected weeks.
Aggregate web return quantity by item for the same selected weeks.
Join channel return aggregates by item and compute per-channel percentage deviation from the average of the three channel quantities.
